breakdown: PR adds a robust numeric extraction helper with fallbacks for LLM-hallucinated reward field names (xp_gained, xpAmount, gold_awarded, etc.) and uses centralized _DNC.convert_value for normalization. The _get_raw helper handles edge cases like empty strings, zeros, NaN/inf values. Tests comprehensively validate both unit and E2E scenarios. Main gaps are missing docstrings on the new helper function and some loose Any typing.
key_changes: Add _get_raw() helper with fallback chain for multiple alias keys
Migrate to _DNC.convert_value for centralized robust numeric conversion
Handle edge cases: empty strings, zero values, NaN/inf treated as 'not present'
Add E2E test that attempts to provoke LLM hallucination with messy reward formats
Add unit tests covering fallbacks, aliases, and edge case permutations
